meaning: n.鸣禽,鸣鸟,女歌手,<俚>告密者
examples: They observed no significant effect on songbird nesting success.
Removing waterfowl-nest predators could affect songbird nesting success through subsequent increases in small-mammal populations.
Most predators of waterfowl nests prey opportunistically on songbird nests, and removing these predators could directly increase songbird nesting success.
To me, Songbird is an extremely complex character and was the one disappointing element of Infinite.
This one hands you information about Songbird, albeit given in the form of questions.
